title: Essex Property (ESS) Down 11% in a Month: Is it Worth a Look?
text: Essex Property's (ESS) recent price correction offers investors a chance to add the stock to their portfolio, given its strong growth potential on the back of recovering West Coast market fundamentals.

title: Top 5 REITs For A 100-Year-Old
text: Strong growth in cash flow and solid dividend growth. Big discounts to NAV and unusually low AFFO multiples.

title: Is it Wise to Retain Essex Property (ESS) Stock for Now?
text: Essex Property (ESS) is well-poised to benefit from the favorable West Coast market fundamentals and a solid balance sheet. However, outmigration trends and interest rate hikes are concerning.

title: Essex Property Trust to Present at the 2022 Bank of America Global Real Estate Conference
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announced today that the Essex Executive Team will participate in a roundtable presentation at the Bank of America Global Real Estate Conference on Wednesday, September 14, 2022, at 1:25 p.m. Eastern Time. To listen to the presentation please visit the webcast link on the Investors section of the Company's website at www.essex.com. An archive of the webcast will be available for ninety days following the event. Additional
